goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'european' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
